Preferences

Your personal setup — display, menu, Live TV and profiles. Saved per device or per account where it makes sense.

Cover size on this device

How big poster art renders in rows and grids (saved on this device).

Content text size

Text size for movies, shows, music, Live TV and library pages. The left menu and Settings stay fixed.

Theme on this device

Accent colors for buttons, focus rings and badges.

Screensaver

When Triboon is idle outside playback, show the artwork screensaver after this delay.

Playback languages

When a file carries your language, it's selected automatically (audio picks the best surround layout available in that language).

Subtitle startup behavior.

Choose per title never starts captions automatically. Always uses the selected subtitle language, or English when no subtitle language is selected.

Caption style.

Dialogue only auto-picks clean captions. SDH prefers captions that include [music], [door creaks], and speaker labels for the hard of hearing. Both stay available in the captions menu.

Playback

Auto-play starts the next episode after a 10-second countdown — off shows the Up Next card without the countdown.

Subtitle size (closed captions).

Web browser quality

Browsers can't decode 4K (it's almost always HEVC), so 4K plays through a heavy live transcode that often stutters. Cap playback at 1080p for smooth direct play, or allow 4K if this computer is powerful. (This browser only — the TV app always plays 4K natively.)

Menu — reorder or hide

Arrange the sidebar the way you use it; hidden items disappear from the rail.

My IPTV playlists

Save a personal M3U or Xtream playlist to your account. Browser, Android TV, and other signed-in clients see the same source; Android TV can also keep a device-only playlist.

No personal playlists saved.

Channel categories

Untick the categories you never watch — they disappear from your channel list and guide. Changes save automatically.

loading…

Profiles & PINs

Parental locks: setting or changing a PIN always asks for the account password.

Approve a device (Quick Connect)

Signing in on a TV? Enter the 6-digit code it shows — the TV connects as your account.

Trakt

Link your Trakt account: what you watch is scrobbled automatically, and your watchlist stays in sync both ways.

checking…

App updates

Install the latest Triboon app — one build runs on both Android TV and phone.

Current app: checking...

YouTube Music

Connect your account to place Liked Music and your playlists at the top of the Music page. Public mixes, weekly picks and seasonal rows work without connecting.

Sources

Server settings

Admin-only. Users of this server never see this screen.

Engine

Live status from the Triboon server.

EngineChecking...

Streaming performance

Let Triboon size server read-ahead and connection use from your provider capacity, server network, and expected simultaneous users. Auto keeps starts and seeks ahead of background read-ahead. Speeds are in Mbps (megabits per second — your internet line speed, not megabytes); read-ahead goals are in seconds and connections are per stream.

Providers
--
waiting for server
Playback pool
--
available articles
Start reserve
--
starts and seeks
Live pressure
--
active playback

Max release size

Auto sets no hard limit — ranking simply prefers sizes that start fast, while every release stays in Sources. Manual hides releases above your GB caps from Sources and auto-play entirely. Smaller caps mean lower bitrate per stream, so more simultaneous viewers fit.

Activity

Usenet connections

No recent playback.

Admin password

Change the owner password. This signs out old sessions immediately.

Admin two-factor sign-in

Protect the owner account with an authenticator app. Existing users are unchanged.

StatusChecking...
Add this manual key to your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code above.
Manual key
Authenticator URL

Usenet providers

Add one or more NNTP providers — extras act as failover when articles are missing. Each has its own connection limit. Credentials are encrypted at rest and never sent to clients.

Indexers

Newznab-compatible indexers — searches fan out to all of them in parallel and results are merged.

Local libraries

Library folders are re-checked automatically for new movies and episodes. Known items keep their cached TMDB match, so a no-change pass costs one quick disk walk and zero network. Per-library actions (scan now · refresh all metadata) live in each library's Edit panel.

Scoring

Releases are ranked with built-in TRaSH-Guides-style weights tuned for instant streaming — leaving everything empty keeps that recommended default. Your entries layer on top: group names match the release's -GROUP suffix and override the built-in tiers; keywords add their score to any release whose name contains them.

TMDB metadata

Server-side TMDB key — clients browse through the server proxy and never see it.

Subtitles

Wyzie Subs — unlimited free subtitle search. Paste your Wyzie key here; Triboon keeps it server-side and caches results per title.

OpenSubtitles — adds hash-exact matching (perfectly-synced subs for the exact file you stream). Needs ALL THREE: the free API key (opensubtitles.com → account → API consumers) finds subtitles; your username + password are required to download them (per-account quota). Stored encrypted server-side.

Which source runs, and which wins when results are comparable. Exact-match signals (file hash, exact release, right episode) always beat the preference.

Trakt

Lets every user link their own Trakt account (scrobbling + watchlist sync). Create a free API app at trakt.tv/oauth/applications and paste its id + secret. When the form asks for a Redirect URI, use this (click to copy):

Guide sync

Live TV loads from the server cache first. The server refreshes guides on a schedule and keeps stale data available while a refresh runs.

Live TV (IPTV)

M3U playlist or an Xtream Codes login — a “Live TV” section appears for everyone, with channel logos, groups, favorites and a now/next guide.

Share with (nobody ticked = everyone)

Invite a user

Single-use link, expires in 48h. Pick their quality cap.

Display defaults

Cover-art size for poster rows and grids (saved on this device). Every user can also set this — plus hide or reorder their menu — under Preferences in their own sidebar.

Theme defaults

Accent colors for buttons, focus rings and badges (saved on this device).
